Package
Description
io.github.jchejarla.springbatch.clustering.autoconfigure
Spring Boot auto-configuration and the configuration-property surface for clustering.

  • Uses of BatchClusterProperties in io.github.jchejarla.springbatch.clustering.autoconfigure

    Method
    Description
    BatchClusterDataSourceScriptDatabaseInitializer
    BatchClusterAutoConfiguration.batchClusterDataSourceScriptDatabaseInitializer(DataSource dataSource, BatchClusterProperties batchClusterProperties)
    Optionally creates the cluster tables on startup, controlled by spring.batch.cluster.initialize-schema (see BatchClusterProperties).
